message:
Merge PR #2758: fix: skip stale-binary warning for beads-only commits

Suppress false-positive stale-binary warnings when the only commits since
the binary was built are .beads/ changes (e.g., bd backup commits).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2758
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
